title: Youngever 6 Pack Plastic Martini Glasses, 300ML Shatterproof Martini Cups
features: Shatterproof Plastic Martini Glasses BEST VALUE- Set of 6 Reusable Shatterproof Martini Glasses (300ml).
QUALITY - Made of Upscale, Recyclable, Reusable, Shatterproof, Crystal Clear Plastic. No BPA, NO LEAD.
CHIC AND MODERN - Ideal for serving your favorite martinis wines, cocktails, juices, desserts and more. Great for Party, wedding, baby shower, special events, poolside, outdoor, picnic.
HOLIDAY GIFT - The elegant look makes it a perfect gift for your friends and family.
SIZE – Capacity: 300ml. Top diameter is 10cm, and the height is 9.5cm.
